name: Email Triage to Karbon Project Assignment
description: Email triage to Karbon project assignment workflow with redaction, AI classification, confidence-based routing, and daily digest

options.systemMessage: You are an email triage classifier for a bookkeeping practice. You ONLY output structured JSON matching the required schema. Never include extra commentary.

parameters.jsonSchemaExample: {"matched_project_id":"WI-1023","confidence":"high","reasoning":"Email mentions November receipts, matching the Monthly Bookkeeping - Nov 2025 project.","suggested_category":"Reply"}

parameters.url: <__PLACEHOLDER_VALUE__Karbon API endpoint to add a note/link to a Work Item, e.g. https://api.karbonhq.com/v3/WorkItems/{id}/Notes__>
<__PLACEHOLDER_VALUE__Karbon API endpoint to create a Triage item, e.g. https://api.karbonhq.com/v3/Triage__>

parameters.content:
## Karbon API Placeholders

The HTTP Request nodes pointing to Karbon need:
1. Your Karbon API base URL
2. A "Karbon API" credential (Header Auth) with your API key
3. Correct endpoint paths for WorkItems / Triage

See Karbon API docs to fill these in.
## Redaction Step\n\nStrips SSNs, EINs, account/routing numbers, and card numbers before anything (including the AI) sees the email content. Tune regex patterns against real samples.

## GOAL
Automatically triage incoming client emails for the bookkeeping practice:
1. Redact sensitive financial data (SSNs, account/routing numbers, etc.) before any AI sees it
2. Identify which Karbon client and open Work Item (project) the email relates to
3. Either auto-link high-confidence matches to the right Karbon project, or flag uncertain ones for a quick human decision via Slack

This replaces manual Triage-to-project assignment in Karbon with an AI-assisted first pass -- human review stays in the loop for anything the AI isn't confident about.

Companion workflow: "Karbon Daily Triage Digest" (separate workflow) handles the once-a-day summary check-in.

## OUTCOME: High Confidence
When the AI is confident (confidence = "high"):

- A note is posted directly to the matched Karbon Work Item
- The note includes the AI's reasoning, so there's an audit trail
- No human action needed for this email

During shadow mode (first 1-2 weeks), route this branch to manual review too — don't let it write to Karbon yet.

## OUTCOME: Needs Review
When confidence is "medium" or "low" (or no client/project match was found):

- A normal Triage item is created in Karbon (unassigned), tagged with the AI's best-guess project + reasoning
- A Slack message is sent to your review channel with the AI's suggestion and reasoning
- You make the final call on which project it belongs to

This is the safety net — nothing gets silently mis-filed.

⚠️ Set the Slack channel ID in 'Notify Manual Review' before activating.
